title: 033 - ORES Gas - Charging curve Schedule (ORES)
description:
[Publisher: ORES] In order to measure the impact of its Open Data, Ores is interested in being kept informed of the reuses that will be made of the data made available.
The information provided on this site is for information purposes only. They have not been officially validated and should not be considered as validated data.nnAvailability of 2 datasets linked by the ID number:
1. Hourly load curves from gas-connecting meters over an entire year.
2. Contractual data of customers with hourly load curves from gas-connecting meters over an entire year
> These 2 complete files, as well as the corresponding captions can be downloaded from the Attachments section at the bottom of the page.
> The dataset that can be downloaded via the Export tab is a sample of the complete ‘Charge curve’ file.nnDescription of fields:
1. Hourly load curves from gas-connecting meters over an entire year.
Name of report: Hourly load curves from gas-connecting meters over an entire year.
Level of aggregation: The dataset contains unaggregated raw data.
Year of consumption: 2025
Scope: This dataset contains sampling hourly load curves for 1500 anonymised communicating gas meters.
The data relate exclusively to residential customers.
Energy: Gas
Frequency: Annual
Date on which the dataset was made available: March 2026
ID: Anonymized customer identification number
MeasuredUTCAt: Date and time (UTC) corresponding to the beginning of the volume measurement interval, in a 60-minute window.
_m_ levy: Volume taken over the time period (1h) - in m³nn2.Contractual data of customers with hourly load curves from electricity communicating meters over an entire year.
Name of report: Contractual data of customers with hourly load curves from gas communicating meters over an entire year.
Year of consumption: 2025
Scope: This dataset contains contractual data for customers with hourly load curves.
Energy: Gas
Frequency: Annual
Date on which the dataset was made available: March 2026
ID: Anonymized customer identification number
_total_m³ levy: Total annual levy volume (m³)
